gym.title: Secret Training Club
gym.subtitle: Strength doesn't come from nothing, build your body to control the streets.
gym.insufficientEnergy: Your energy is not enough for this exercise, rest a bit.
gym.overtrained: You've overexerted yourself! Your health is starting to deteriorate.
gym.supplementSuccess: You used {{name}}, felt a sudden surge of energy!

descriptions.treadmill: Improve your speed and agility on the modern treadmill.
descriptions.bench_press: Push your limits with heavy weights to build massive chest strength.
descriptions.squats: Build a strong and solid foundation through intense squat exercises.
descriptions.punching_bag: Improve your endurance and reflexes by hitting the punching bag.
descriptions.dumbbells: Precise exercises to build strong and symmetrical muscles.

common.insufficientFunds: Insufficient funds! Your data has been updated.
common.success: Success! Your data has been updated.
common.failed: Error! The operation failed, please try again.
common.noMoney: Insufficient clean money to complete this action!
common.noDirtyMoney: Insufficient dirty money to complete this action!
common.invalidAmount: Invalid amount, please enter a valid value.

safe_house.title: Safe House
safe_house.targetInside: Target is inside their safe house and cannot be attacked!

inventory.title: Secret Inventory
inventory.desc: Manage your properties and smuggled goods.

login.disclaimerText: MAFIA STREETS is a work of fiction for entertainment purposes only...
login.loginIssue: If you encounter a login issue, please
login.openNewTab: open the app in a new tab
login.title: MAFIA STREETS
login.subtitle: Control the streets. Build your criminal empire.
login.chooseDesc: Select your role in the gang. This will determine your starting perks.

crimes.martialLawDesc: Martial law has been declared by the Prime Minister. Security forces are on high alert.
crimes.cannotAttackHospital: You cannot attack while in the hospital or the target is in the hospital!
crimes.fatalBlow: Fatal Blow! You killed {{name}} with 100% damage
crimes.attackSuccess: Success! Strike power: {{damage}}% - Stole {{dirty}} dirty money
crimes.attackFailed: You failed the attack (0% damage) and took damage!
crimes.title: Criminal Operations
crimes.gtaDesc: Steal cars from the streets. Low risk, quick cash.
crimes.bankDesc: Requires a professional crew, heavy weapons, and a fast getaway car.

prison.title: Central Prison
prison.subtitle: Behind bars... where criminal dreams end.
prison.bribeSuccess: Bribe successful! You are free now.
prison.noMoney: Not enough money for the bribe!
prison.breakOutFailed: Failed to break out and you were imprisoned with them!
prison.catchSuccess: Caught {{name}} and received a reward of {{reward}}!
prison.tooWeak: This target is much stronger than you!
prison.catchMessage: You were caught by {{name}} and put in prison.

family.title: Family
family.desc: Build your legacy. Marry, have heirs, and expand your empire.
family.educationWait: You must wait {{minutes}} minutes before studying again.
family.divorceConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to divorce? This action cannot be undone.
family.kickChildConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to kick this child from the family?
family.changeGenderDesc: Changing gender will reset your entire family. Are you sure?
family.maxWives: You have reached the maximum number of partners.
family.maleDesc: You can have up to 4 wives.

police.title: Security & Prison Service
police.jailed: You are behind bars! Time remaining:
police.upgradesDesc: Pay bribes to officials to turn a blind eye to your activities.

documents.title: Official Documents
documents.desc: Manage your identity documents and official licenses.

prison.subtitle: Behind bars... where criminal dreams end.
prison.bribeSuccess: Bribe successful! You are free now.
prison.noMoney: You don't have enough money for a bribe!
prison.breakOutFailed: Failed to break out and you were jailed with them!
prison.catchSuccess: Caught {{name}} and received a reward of {{reward}}!

prison.catchMessage: You have been caught by {{name}} and sent to prison.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.name: Name

admin.electionDesc: Start or stop national election cycle.

errors.patternMismatch: Input does not match the required pattern
errors.offline: Server unreachable, please check your connection
errors.serverBusy: Server busy, please try again in a few seconds
errors.quotaExceeded: Firebase Quota Exceeded: Daily read/write limit reached. Please wait until reset (Midnight UTC).
errors.notLoggedIn: You must be logged in to perform this action
errors.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Please allow popups or open in a new tab.
errors.popupClosed: Login window was closed before completion. If this persists, try opening in a new tab.
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized in Firebase settings.
errors.loginError: Error during login. Please try again or open in a new tab.

heists.title: Bank Heists
heists.inst1: Small heist reward ranges from $8M to $25M randomly
heists.inst2: Large heist reward ranges from $10M to $40M randomly
heists.inst4: Based on equipment, weapons, and vehicle points
heists.notEnoughMoney: Not enough money to create team
heists.alreadyInTeam: You are already in a team
heists.waitingForLeader: Waiting for leader to start heist...
heists.inviteMessage: {{leader}} invites you to join a heist as {{role}} with {{share}}% share
heists.goToHeistsToJoin: Go to Heists section to join the team
heists.selectGearDesc: Select your gear for this operation. Better gear increases team power.
heists.successMessage: Heist successful! Your share is ${{amount}} dirty money.
heists.failedMessage: Heist failed! You didn't get any loot.
heists.noPlayersFound: No players found with this name
